message:
Add comprehensive Timeline renderExpanded tests for all state types

Add tests covering all state color branches in timeline renderExpanded:
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedRejected: tests red color for rejected state
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedFailed: tests red color for failed state
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedPending: tests blue color for pending state
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedExecuting: tests blue color for executing state
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedTimeout: tests yellow color for timeout state
- TestTimelineRenderExpandedEscalated: tests yellow color for escalated state

Coverage for renderExpanded improved from 90% to 100%.
Package coverage improved from 98.8% to 99.5%.
